changes: Draft: SNAKE, 90s per pick, pick trading disabled
Divisions: 2 division(s): East, West → 4 division(s): Redeemers, Has-Beens, Extras, Noobs
Scoring added — Every 10 pass completions (+1 pts)
Scoring removed (4 rules) — Every 5 pass completions (was +1 pts), 50+ yard TD pass bonus (was +1 pts), 400+ yard passing game bonus (was +2 pts), 200+ yard receiving game bonus (was +2 pts)
Scoring changed — 200+ yard rushing game bonus: +2 → +1 pts
Divisions: 4 division(s): Redeemers, Has-Beens, Extras, Noobs → 1 division(s): Fantasy Footbawlers
Scoring added (3 rules) — Passing Yards (+0.04 pts), Rushing Yards (+0.1 pts), Receiving Yards (+0.1 pts)

Scoring removed (20 rules) — Every 25 passing yards (was +1 pts), Every 10 pass completions (was +1 pts), 300-399 yard passing game bonus (was +1 pts), Every 10 rushing yards (was +1 pts), Every 5 rush attempts (was +1 pts), 50+ yard TD rush bonus (was +1 pts), 100-199 yard rushing game bonus (was +1 pts), 200+ yard rushing game bonus (was +1 pts), 50+ yard TD rec bonus (was +1 pts), Every 10 receiving yards (was +1 pts), Every 5 receptions (was +1 pts), 100-199 yard receiving game bonus (was +1 pts), D/ST: <100 total yards allowed (was +5 pts), D/ST: 100-199 yards allowed (was +3 pts), D/ST: 200-299 yards allowed (was +2 pts), D/ST: 350-399 yards allowed (was -1 pts), D/ST: 400-449 yards allowed (was -3 pts), D/ST: 450-499 yards allowed (was -5 pts), D/ST: 500-549 yards allowed (was -6 pts), D/ST: 550+ yards allowed (was -7 pts)
Scoring added (3 rules) — Each Reception (PPR) (+0.5 pts), 2pt Return (+2 pts), 1pt Safety (+1 pts)
Scoring added — Each PAT Missed (-0.5 pts)
Scoring added (3 rules) — D/ST: Each Fumble Forced (+1.5 pts), FG Made (50-59 yards) (+5 pts), FG Made (60+ yards) (+5 pts)
Scoring removed — FG Made (50+ yards, pre-split) (was +5 pts)
Scoring changed — D/ST: Each Fumble Recovered: +2 → +1.5 pts
Scoring changed (2 rules) — D/ST: Each Fumble Recovered: +1.5 → +2 pts, D/ST: Each Fumble Forced: +1.5 → +1 pts
